Localization.Description: A remote administration utility was used

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} started remote administration utility {object.process.name} and triggered a connection from host {src.host} to port {dst.port} of host {dst.host}, which is usually used by Virtual Network Computing (VNC) services, on host {event_src.host}. Artifact: the hash (tool: {datafield9}).

User {subject.account.name} started remote administration utility {object.process.name} and triggered a connection from host {src.host} to port {dst.port} of host {dst.host}, which is usually used by Virtual Network Computing (VNC) services, on host {event_src.host}. Artifact: the process name ({datafield9}).

User {subject.account.name} launched remote administration utility {object.process.name} and copied file "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Artifact: the process name ({datafield9}). Description: {datafield7}.

User {subject.account.name} launched remote administration utility {object.process.name} and copied file "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Artifact: the hash (tool: {datafield9}). Description: {datafield7}.
User {subject.account.name} launched remote administration utility {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}. Artifact: the hash (tool: {datafield9}). Description: {datafield7}.
User {subject.account.name} launched remote administration utility {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}. Artifact: the file name ({datafield9}). Description: {datafield7}.
